title: De-contaminate is_northmarq against the SF Internal Comp export
nm_signal: Comp Type = Internal = a Northmarq/SJC-brokered sale (Scott-confirmed). No broker/Direct-Co-Broke columns on the Comp object; buy-side cannot be split (minor population caveat).
match_rule: vertical-scoped: state + sold_date +/-120d + sold_price +/-6%; confirm with city OR tenant(agency); best-per-comp then dedup to one comp per sale (1:1).
status: DRY-RUN — no production flag writes performed. Awaiting Scott's gate.

other_named_broker_hold.action: HOLD — individual names / garbage strings ('None','M') / small firms; none clearly competitor megafirm, none clearly NM; needs Scott judgment

r74_reversals.note: R74 (Deal-object export) REMOVED these; the more-authoritative Comp object confirms them NM (exact price+date, city+tenant confirmed; co-broked with C&W/Flagship/Matthews). R74c RE-ADDS.

held_R74_buckets_resolution.held_84_null_broker_removes: Now 66 null-broker in the flagged-unmatched set -> HOLD (not stripped). Conservative per guardrail.

held_R74_buckets_resolution.task4_no_match_4: Subsumed into the 18 import candidates below.

import_candidates_report_only.note: Internal Sold comps matching NOTHING in dia sales_transactions; 9 of 18 carry no price (un-fingerprintable). Do NOT import here.

topic20_value_prop.conclusion: REPRODUCES: the deck's dia NM 6.38% is the curated Internal-comp median over the LONG (all-time) window (export 6.34% / matched-DB 6.40%), NOT the 2yr set (6.78%). Resolves Task 5 for dia: window+cohort answer on the curated comps. NM trades ~25bps tighter than market all-time, ~37bps tighter 2yr.

gov.status: REPORT-ONLY — do NOT switch gov basis or re-flag in this round (guardrail). Gov has no is_northmarq_source column yet.

cap_discrepancy_investigation.finding: NO Internal-vs-DB basis contradiction. The Internal export (8.00%), the matched sales' own DB sold_cap_rate (8.00%), AND the current flagged set (7.90%) ALL agree at ~8%. The deck's ~6.78% gov NM figure is therefore NOT the raw sold_cap_rate of the flag set — it is a different cohort/aggregation (likely NOI-derived cap_rate_history, or a federal/term sub-cut, or the capital_markets_quarterly rollup).
cap_discrepancy_investigation.recommendation: Do not change gov is_northmarq off this set yet. Gov flags ARE badly incomplete (80 Internal comps unflagged) and re-flagging would NOT move the raw ~8% NM cap — but first reconcile which gov cohort/basis the deck's 6.78% comes from, since that is the number gov reproduction depends on. Separate gated step; add is_northmarq_source to gov at that time.

guardrails_honored: Flag-column + is_northmarq_source only. No price/term/cap writes.
